codeReview.summary: The baseline packet cleanly performed the required preservation and base-sync work without leaking product-code changes into later remediation scope. The handoff evidence and commit diff show `docs/packet-governance-baseline` captured only `.factory/**` and `docs/code-review/**` assets, then local `Factory-droid` was reset to `origin/Factory-droid` on a clean tree. The feature correctly returned partial status when the pre-existing gate-fast NPE on the synced base blocked a validator-clean finish, and that blocker was later closed by `8c8ab717`, so there is no remaining concern with the baseline preservation itself.

summary: PASS. The docs-only preservation branch and synced `Factory-droid` base were established with attributable evidence and no product-code contamination.
